field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '抵扣登记', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'name', 'deduction_flow_label', 'business_category_id', 'source_origin']}, {'title': '项目与扣款单位', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'company_id', 'partner_id', 'partner_name', 'deduction_unit_name']}, {'title': '单据与发票', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['document_no', 'document_date', 'invoice_no', 'invoice_code', 'invoice_date', 'tax_rate_text']}, {'title': '金额税额', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['invoice_amount_untaxed', 'invoice_tax_amount', 'invoice_amount_total', 'withholding_amount', 'deduction_amount', 'deduction_tax_amount', 'deduction_surcharge_amount', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '抵扣办理', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['deduction_confirm_date', 'deduction_reason']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'attachment_ids', 'deduction_bill_attachment_text', 'message_attachment_count']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_source_model', 'legacy_source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'legacy_document_state', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'source_created_by', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 20}, {'name': 'deduction_flow_label', 'sequence': 30, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'business_category_id', 'sequence': 40}, {'name': 'source_origin', 'sequence': 50}, {'name': 'project_id', 'sequence': 60}, {'name': 'company_id', 'sequence': 70, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'partner_id', 'sequence': 80}, {'name': 'partner_name', 'sequence': 90, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'deduction_unit_name', 'sequence': 100}, {'name': 'document_no', 'sequence': 110}, {'name': 'document_date', 'sequence': 120}, {'name': 'invoice_no', 'sequence': 130}, {'name': 'invoice_code', 'sequence': 140}, {'name': 'invoice_date', 'sequence': 150}, {'name': 'tax_rate_text', 'sequence': 160, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'invoice_amount_untaxed', 'sequence': 170}, {'name': 'invoice_tax_amount', 'sequence': 180}, {'name': 'invoice_amount_total', 'sequence': 190}, {'name': 'withholding_amount', 'sequence': 200}, {'name': 'deduction_amount', 'sequence': 210}, {'name': 'deduction_tax_amount', 'sequence': 220}, {'name': 'deduction_surcharge_amount', 'sequence': 230}, {'name': 'currency_id', 'sequence': 240}, {'name': 'deduction_confirm_date', 'sequence': 250}, {'name': 'deduction_reason', 'sequence': 260}, {'name': 'note', 'sequence': 270}, {'name': 'attachment_ids', 'sequence': 280}, {'name': 'deduction_bill_attachment_text', 'sequence': 290, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'message_attachment_count', 'sequence': 300, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_source_model', 'sequence': 310, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_source_table', 'sequence': 320, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_record_id', 'sequence': 330, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_document_state', 'sequence': 340, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'creator_name', 'sequence': 350, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'created_time', 'sequence': 360, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'source_created_by', 'sequence': 370, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'source_created_at', 'sequence': 380, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'active', 'sequence': 390} ] } } } }

field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '外经证登记', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['document_state_label', 'document_state', 'document_no', 'document_date']}, {'title': '项目与相对方', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'project_name', 'partner_id', 'partner_name']}, {'title': '合同信息', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['contract_no', 'contract_name', 'contract_start_date', 'contract_end_date']}, {'title': '金额执行', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['planned_amount', 'invoice_amount', 'paid_amount']}, {'title': '涉税证明', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['taxpayer_name', 'taxpayer_identifier', 'counterparty_tax_identifier', 'tax_report_management_no', 'regional_tax_contact', 'regional_tax_contact_phone']}, {'title': '经办与附件', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['handler_name', 'handler_phone', 'note', 'attachment_ids', 'attachment_links']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'request_legacy_id', 'legacy_pid', 'project_legacy_id', 'partner_legacy_id', 'contract_legacy_id', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'document_state_label', 'sequence': 10, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'document_state', 'sequence': 20, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'document_no', 'sequence': 30}, {'name': 'document_date', 'sequence': 40}, {'name': 'project_id', 'sequence': 50}, {'name': 'project_name', 'sequence': 60, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'partner_id', 'sequence': 70}, {'name': 'partner_name', 'sequence': 80}, 'planned_amount', 'sequence': 130}, {'name': 'invoice_amount', 'sequence': 140}, {'name': 'paid_amount', 'sequence': 150}, {'name': 'taxpayer_name', 'sequence': 160}, {'name': 'taxpayer_identifier', 'sequence': 170}, {'name': 'counterparty_tax_identifier', 'sequence': 180}, {'name': 'tax_report_management_no', 'sequence': 190}, {'name': 'regional_tax_contact', 'sequence': 200}, {'name': 'regional_tax_contact_phone', 'sequence': 210}, {'name': 'handler_name', 'sequence': 220}, {'name': 'handler_phone', 'sequence': 230}, {'name': 'note', 'sequence': 240}, {'name': 'attachment_ids', 'sequence': 250}, {'name': 'attachment_links', 'sequence': 260, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'source_table', 'sequence': 270, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_record_id', 'sequence': 280,
